title: Disable pure trailing-stop advisory output
hypothesis: Pure TRAILING_STOP should stop being generated as an advisory rule because trailing partial-reduce replay was rejected and shared policy already maps pure trailing to 0% reduce.
scope: Disable TRAILING_STOP advisory rule generation in position_manager.evaluate_exit_signals.
Keep trailing stop risk-reference fields and portfolio heat effective-stop logic unchanged.
Update focused tests and record no-drift backtest evidence.
non_goals: Do not change portfolio heat or deterministic stop/target execution.
acceptance: High-water trailing-stop scenario no longer emits TRAILING_STOP from evaluate_exit_signals.
